docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CASEY, ANNE J AS TO DEFENDANT CASHGATE, INC. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
